name: Clear Effector
name_jp: クリア・エフェクター
desc: If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Synchro Material: Draw 1 card. A Synchro Monster that used this card as a Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by card effects.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Synchro Material: Draw 1 card. A Synchro Monster that used this card as a Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by card effects.
eff: If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Synchro Material: Draw 1 card. A Synchro Monster that used this card as a Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by card effects.

action: Activates if used as Synchro Material
Applies effect when used as Synchro Material
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
